title: Options Income Series - Earn Double-Digit Income (January 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate an options income strategy that's sustainable and repeatable.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Stocks That Recession-Proof This Hot Mutual Fund
text: Many investors fear a possible recession in 2023. Managers of one hot mutual fund like stocks that do well across the business cycle.

title: 3 Best Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Ahead of 2023
text: Amid a hawkish Fed and volatile markets, it's judicious to invest in dividend aristocrats such as Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), W.W. Grainger (GWW) and Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) for steady income.

title: Why Is Expeditors International (EXPD) Up 2.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Earnings Estimates Moving Higher for Expeditors International (EXPD): Time to Buy?
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.
